flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Valley City State University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.9% → 0.0%).

flags.label: First-year retention
flags.summary: First-year retention at Valley City State University rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 (60.6% → 70.9%).
